finalize.title: Finalize Report
finalize.subtitle: Turn this completed analysis into a signed, audit-preserved report.

check.body: Confirm all measurements, lesions, and the FLR plane have been reviewed.
check.reviewedConfirm: I have reviewed all measurements, lesions, and the FLR plane.
check.notReady: This analysis is not ready to finalize — status: {{status}}

watermark.heading: RESEARCH USE ONLY — NOT FOR CLINICAL DECISIONS
watermark.body: This report is informational only. Clinical judgment rests with a qualified physician.

pacs.enable: Push SEG + SR to configured PACS destinations
pacs.skip: Skip now — push manually later from the Report page
pacs.hint: You can also skip now and push manually from the Report page later.

review.hint: Full preview available on the Report page once finalize completes.

ship.body: Finalizing requires a step-up MFA challenge.

success.title: Report finalized
success.subtitle: The PDF, DICOM-SEG, and DICOM-SR artifacts are being assembled.

pdf.finalizing: The PDF is still being built; this panel will refresh automatically.
pdf.claimHidden: PDF preview is restricted for the current RUO claim scope.

pacs.title: PACS Delivery
pacs.empty: No PACS destinations pushed yet. Click "Start push" to fan out to configured destinations.
pacs.demoBlocked: Sample-data reports cannot be pushed to a real PACS destination.

retract.title: Retract Report
retract.body: Retraction is audit-preserving: the report row is kept and flagged. Downstream viewers will see a "Retracted" banner.
retract.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this report is being retracted…

view.title: Report
view.heading: Analysis report
view.claimHidden: Report is restricted for the current RUO claim scope.
view.noIdDescription: Open a finalized analysis from your cases list to view its report.

findings.title: Additional findings
findings.subtitle: Heuristic screening from CT attenuation + segmentation masks. Not a substitute for radiologist interpretation.
findings.cystsDetail: Meets all 4 simple-cyst criteria — no follow-up needed.
